plan.rationale: novel territory; record for later consolidation

thought.text: The FullSense umbrella project appears to be an integrated system aimed at enhancing various aspects of user experience through interconnected components like llmesh (network infrastructure), llive (real-time interaction tools), llove (emotional connection and feedback mechanisms), lldesign (user interface and aesthetic design principles), and lltrade (transactional capabilities). Each component seems to serve a distinct yet complementary function, suggesting a holistic approach to technology integration. This structure reminds me of systems theory, where each part interacts dynamically with others to create a functional whole, but the specific focus on emotional and transactional elements is intriguingly unique.
